scripts.cape:bootstrap:build: bun run cape:bootstrap:prebuild && bun scripts/build.ts cape-cli/cli.config.ts
scripts.cape:bootstrap:build:all: bun run cape:bootstrap:prebuild && cd cape-cli && cape build --all-platforms
scripts.cape:install: bun run cape:bootstrap:build && mkdir -p $HOME/.cape/bin && cp dist/cape $HOME/.cape/bin/cape && echo 'Installed cape to ~/.cape/bin/cape'
scripts.hooks:install: git config core.hooksPath .githooks && echo 'Git hooks installed.'
